title: Act on Promotion of Information and Communications Network Utilization enacted
title_ko: 정보통신망 이용촉진 등에 관한 법률 제정
description: First online privacy law. Laid groundwork for internet privacy protection.
description_ko: 최초 온라인 개인정보보호법. 인터넷 프라이버시 보호 기반 마련.

title: Credit Information Use and Protection Act major amendment
description: Strengthened financial sector personal data protection. Credit bureaus regulated.
description_ko: 금융권 개인정보보호 강화. 신용정보회사 규제 강화.

title: Electronic Financial Transactions Act enacted
description: Secured electronic payments. CISO designation mandatory for financial institutions.
description_ko: 전자금융거래 보안 강화. 금융기관 CISO 지정 의무화.

title: Personal Information Protection Act enacted
description: Korea's first comprehensive privacy law enacted. Fines: up to 50M won.
description_ko: 대한민국 최초 종합 개인정보보호법 제정. 과태료: 최대 5천만원.

title: Card 3 scandal erupts - 104M records leaked
description: KB, NH, Lotte card breach. Largest financial data breach in Korean history.
description_ko: KB국민, NH농협, 롯데카드 유출. 한국 역사상 최대 금융정보 유출.

title: First major amendment after Card 3 scandal
title_ko: 카드3사 사태 후 첫 대규모 개정
description: After 104M records leaked, penalties strengthened. CEO responsibility added.
description_ko: 1억 400만건 유출 후 처벌 강화. 대표이사 책임 신설.

title: Punitive damages system introduced
description: Up to 3x compensation for intentional violations.

title: First fine under current system
description: Hanatour fined 345M won - first administrative fine case.

title: Data 3 Act amendment
description: PIPC established as independent agency. Pseudonymized data allowed. Network Act privacy provisions merged into PIPA.
description_ko: 개인정보보호위원회 독립기관화. 가명정보 활용 허용. 정보통신망법 개인정보 조항 개인정보보호법으로 이관.

title: MyData service launched
description: Credit Information Act revision takes effect. Data portability rights granted.
description_ko: 신용정보법 개정 시행. 개인신용정보 전송요구권 도입.

title: Major penalty enhancement
description: Fines raised to 3% of TOTAL revenue (not just related). Aligned with GDPR.
description_ko: 과징금 전체 매출액의 3%로 상향 (관련 매출액 → 전체). GDPR 수준으로.

title: Golfzon fine - First under revised law
description: 7.5B won fine - first major case under 2023 revision.

title: Electronic Financial Transactions Act strengthened
description: Enhanced penalties for major security incidents. CISO accountability increased.
description_ko: 중대 보안사고 시 처벌 강화. CISO 책임 확대.

title: SK Telecom - Record fine
description: 134.8B won - largest fine ever in Korea.
